full_name: UAE National Electronic Security Authority — Information Assurance Standards

controls.requirement: Information Security Policy Exists and Is Approved
controls.description: A formal, board-approved information security policy must exist, be communicated to all staff, and be reviewed annually.
controls.logic: FAIL if no policy document record exists, if approval_date is NULL, or if last_review_date is older than 12 months.

controls.requirement: Information Security Strategy Aligned to Business Strategy
controls.description: An information security strategy must be documented, approved by senior management, and aligned to organizational objectives.
controls.logic: FAIL if strategy document has no senior_management_approval or if strategy_review_date is older than 24 months.

controls.requirement: Formal Risk Assessment Conducted and Documented
controls.description: A formal risk assessment must be conducted at least annually covering all critical assets and information systems.
controls.logic: FAIL if no risk_assessment record exists, or if the most recent assessment_date is older than 12 months, or if risk_score and treatment_plan are NULL.

controls.requirement: Risk Treatment Plans Defined and Tracked
controls.description: For every identified risk above the accepted threshold, a treatment plan must exist with an owner and target completion date.
controls.logic: FAIL if any risk record with risk_level IN ('HIGH','CRITICAL') has no linked treatment_plan or if treatment_owner is NULL.

controls.requirement: Security Awareness Training Completed by All Staff
controls.description: All employees and contractors must complete security awareness training annually.
controls.logic: FAIL if any active employee record has no training_completion_date within the last 12 months for the security_awareness course.

controls.description: Background verification checks must be completed for all employees before they are granted access to systems.
controls.logic: FAIL if any employee record has system_access_granted_date earlier than background_check_completion_date, or if background_check_status is NULL.

controls.description: User access to all systems must be revoked within 24 hours of employment termination.
controls.logic: FAIL if any terminated_employee record has account_disabled_date more than 1 day after termination_date, or if account_status is still 'ACTIVE' after termination.

controls.requirement: Compliance with UAE Laws and Regulations Tracked
controls.description: Organization must maintain a register of applicable laws and regulations and track compliance status for each.
controls.logic: FAIL if any compliance_register record has status = 'NON_COMPLIANT' or if last_review_date is older than 6 months.

controls.requirement: Information Security Metrics Collected and Reported
controls.description: Key performance indicators and metrics must be collected and reported to management quarterly.
controls.logic: FAIL if no metrics_report record exists for the current quarter, or if metrics_reported_to_management = FALSE.

controls.requirement: All Information Assets Inventoried and Classified
controls.description: A complete, up-to-date inventory of all information assets must exist with classification labels (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted).
controls.logic: FAIL if any asset record has classification = NULL or if asset_last_updated is older than 12 months.

controls.requirement: Physical Access Controls to Data Centers and Server Rooms
controls.description: Physical access to data centers and server rooms must be restricted to authorized personnel with logged access records.
controls.logic: FAIL if physical_access_log records exist for unauthorized personnel, or if access_log_review_date is older than 30 days.

controls.requirement: Change Management Process Followed for System Changes
controls.description: All system changes must go through a formal change management process with approval and testing documentation.
controls.logic: FAIL if any change_request record has change_status = 'DEPLOYED' but approval_status != 'APPROVED' or test_result is NULL.

controls.description: Data backup procedures must be in place and recovery tests must be conducted at least semi-annually.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical_system record has no backup_test_date, or if backup_test_date is older than 6 months, or if last_backup_result = 'FAILED'.

controls.description: User access rights must be limited to only what is required for their role. Privileged access must be separately authorized.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user has access permissions exceeding their role_definition, or if privileged_access flag is TRUE but privileged_access_approval is NULL.

controls.description: All privileged (admin) accounts must be formally reviewed and re-approved every quarter.
controls.logic: FAIL if any account with is_privileged = TRUE has last_access_review_date older than 90 days.

controls.requirement: Multi-Factor Authentication for Remote and Privileged Access
controls.description: MFA must be enforced for all remote access and all privileged account logins.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user with remote_access = TRUE or is_privileged = TRUE has mfa_enabled = FALSE.

controls.requirement: Security Incidents Logged, Classified, and Responded To
controls.description: All security incidents must be logged with classification, response timeline, and resolution documented.
controls.logic: FAIL if any incident record has no classification, or if response_initiated_date is more than 4 hours after detection_date for HIGH/CRITICAL incidents.

controls.requirement: Business Continuity Plan Exists and Is Tested
controls.description: A Business Continuity Plan (BCP) must exist, be approved, and tested at least annually.
controls.logic: FAIL if no BCP document exists, or if bcp_test_date is older than 12 months, or if bcp_test_result = 'FAILED'.
